mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ARTIFACT_HISTORY ( ARTIFACT_ID, PROJECT_ID, ARTIFACT_TYPE, FILE_NAME, FILE_PATH, GENERATED_BY, GENERATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{artifactId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}, #{projectId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}, #{artifactType}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{generatedBy,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}, #{generatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT I.ISSUE_KEY, I.TITLE AS ISSUE_TITLE, W.WORK_DATE, W.WORK_CONTENT, W.SPENT_MINUTES FROM WORK_LOG W INNER JOIN ISSUE I ON W.ISSUE_ID = I.ISSUE_ID WHERE I.PROJECT_ID = #{projectId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler} AND W.WORK_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY W.WORK_DATE ASC, I.ISSUE_KEY ASC

SELECT L.VCS_TYPE, L.REVISION_NO, L.AUTHOR, L.CHANGED_AT, L.MESSAGE, COALESCE(STRING_AGG(DISTINCT I.ISSUE_KEY, ', ' ORDER BY I.ISSUE_KEY), '') AS ISSUE_KEY_TEXT FROM VCS_CHANGE_LOG L LEFT JOIN ISSUE_CHANGE_LOG_MAP M ON L.CHANGE_LOG_ID = M.CHANGE_LOG_ID LEFT JOIN ISSUE I ON M.ISSUE_ID = I.ISSUE_ID WHERE L.PROJECT_ID = #{projectId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler} AND CAST(L.CHANGED_AT AS DATE) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY L.CHANGE_LOG_ID, L.VCS_TYPE, L.REVISION_NO, L.AUTHOR, L.CHANGED_AT, L.MESSAGE ORDER BY L.CHANGED_AT ASC NULLS LAST, L.REVISION_NO ASC
